rulings.Case Title: DAVID ABRAMOVITZ ET AL VS. FARHAT BAJJALIYA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause And Delcaration Regarding Comtempt
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2018, Line 3. Order To Show Cause And Delcaration Regarding Comtempt. DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden. No evidence provide re: willful disobedience. Mr. Hazard's deposition was noticed by a Notice of Deposition; at the hearing he was referred to as "expert" by parties and the Court. (see minutes). Parties have a difference of opinions regarding the meaning of the Court's order. This does not constitute contempt. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALICE LAP-HO WELGE-LUESSEN VS. GEORG YU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion; Notice Of Motion, Mpa, Declarations
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF ALICE WELGE-LUESSEN'S Motion for Substitution of Successor in Interest of Deceased Plaintiff. OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for July 25, 2018. The Court notes that there is a Notice of Appeal in this matter. According to CRC 8.36(a) the motion for substitution must be made in the reviewing court. Unless the Appeal is resolved before July 25, 2018, re-noticed hearing will be ordered off calendar. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PHILLIP BRADY ET AL VS. CIVIC CENTER MOTOR INN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2018, Line 9. PLAINTIFFS PHILLIP BRADY, CHRISTEN WILSON'S Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents. DENIED. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking to compel further responses to discovery, motion is denied as Plaintiff failed to file a separate statement as required by the rules of court. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking verifications, no verifications are required as responses are objections only. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BIANA CHERNOGUZ ET AL VS. LEANA PEREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order To Limit The Scope Of The Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance Of Witness Guillermo Manzanares
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 10, 2018, Line 10. DEFENDANTS LEANA PEREZ, FRANCISCO ARMAS' Motion For Protective Order To Limit The Scope Of The Deposition Subpoena For Personal Appearance Of Witness Guillermo Manzanares. GRANTED. Deposition of Manzanares is limited to issues "reasonably calculated to lead to admissible evidence" on the sole remaining cause of action in the complaint, nuisance. The Court notes that this cause of action incorporates by reference paragraphs 1-37 of the Complaint. However, only those paragraphs that are not subject to the Court's ruling on the Demurer and Motion for Leave to Amend are properly within the scope of deposition in this action. =(501/REQ)
